name: Freezer Ice Cream- Sugar Free
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large container suitable for freezing.
2. Place the container in the freezer and allow to freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
3. Once frozen, scoop into bowls or cones and serve immediately.
Makes 16 one-cup servings.
Exchanges: Each serving equals 1 milk and 3/4 fruit.
Calories: 125
